entities.name: ICSV197
entities.description: A tall, photoinsensitive, midseason sorghum variety with high midge resistance and good grain yield.

entities.name: IS3443
entities.description: Parental line used in the cross to develop ICSV197.

entities.name: DJ6514
entities.description: Parental line used in the cross to develop ICSV197.

entities.name: PEDIGREE SELECTION
entities.description: Breeding method used to develop ICSV197 for resistance to Contarinia sorghicola.

entities.name: CONTARINIA SORGHICOLA
entities.description: A midge pest that affects sorghum.

entities.name: MIDGE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infestation by Contarinia sorghicola.

entities.name: TALL
entities.description: Plant height characteristic, ranging from 1.8 to 3.0 m.

entities.name: PHOTOINSENSITIVE
entities.description: The characteristic of not being affected by day length for flowering.

entities.name: MIDSEASON
entities.description: Maturity characteristic, maturing in 115-125 days.

entities.name: COLLETOTRICHUM GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing anthracnose in sorghum.

entities.name: PUCCINIA
entities.description: A genus of fungi causing rust diseases.

entities.name: GLOEOCERCOSPORA SORGHI
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing leaf spot in sorghum.

entities.name: FODDER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of fodder produced per hectare, measured at 10 t/ha for ICSV197.

entities.name: CSV11
entities.description: A high-yielding sorghum variety used for comparison with ICSV197.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per hectare, measured at 2.8 t/ha for ICSV197.

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein in the grains, measured at 10.3% for ICSV197.

entities.name: LYSINE CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of lysine per gram of protein, measured at 2.9% for ICSV197.

entities.name: COOKING QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the grains when cooked.

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where water is supplied only by rainfall.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where water is supplied by artificial irrigation.
